fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code of the zone.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the zone.

fields.name: Bin Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin type code for the zone. The bin type determines the inbound and outbound flow of items.

fields.name: Warehouse Class Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warehouse class code of the zone. You can store items with the same warehouse class code in this zone.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the special equipment to be used when you work in this zone.

fields.name: Zone Ranking
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ranking of the zone, which is copied to all bins created within the zone.

fields.name: Cross-Dock Bin Zone
fields.tooltip: Specifies if this is a cross-dock zone.
